name: Trump Headquarters
subject: Share your thoughts?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
The President has specifically asked for your input on this... |
---
| | |

Peter,

Over the last 6 months, the President has worked tirelessly to deliver on campaign promises made to the American people, and we want to know what you think about his efforts...Do you think President Trump is working hard to fulfill his campaign promises? **[ **YES**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2c13637c0f00bee879fa321eec220fa410b7cf068b0e2897044f6468ccb19f870301efb7adccedf75ce3a19fc400a5e092b7889b980916a5)** **[ **NO**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2c13637c0f00bee815d259b5dfe1709f39bd9b09fdbdb948fd43bd2a199ac2a9b5f5b928a0a61f09b037aed8c970fc9b8fa45c536fd20a59)**
Together, we're DRAINING THE SWAMP and getting things done in Washington, even though liberals are trying to obstruct us at every turn...

**Your input is crucial to the President, Peter.**

So please, take the quick poll by heading here today -> **[Official Campaign Promise Poll](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2c13637c0f00bee8a0b7ea11599abf78a13c6a5ba0987ec16fb7c7b9317105a4bb114dc1393528e41fd430bbf1cf76a0610b46e3875bcc76)**

Thank you,

Team Trump
**[**TAKE THE POLL**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2c13637c0f00bee8d6ae8bb87ae3a6c4dd4f10019b38152b50df14f9a796401c66d6474508a6000f1af1dcae5d1fa01a1a3b6cfd78a7982b)**
---

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2c13637c0f00bee85fb86bcb189d8513dc821632182573a490f35fa3fedfdb187e52a012fbde8fa3b61923aa52424a91a8a1d7dd50126dd7) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2c13637c0f00bee85753ede210c072916577aaadcfa861ee64a6f5d0ec119e81136556e2d975819d69e91e1d2c9b0e17ed354eadff4c195f) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab67c32f624ab2b13905e1fa871d3ee3a43a30327833a04c12bd6821107b7f1c35d22ea951d9f5131fa5e660ab743fdd1f) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d4846969ca870fa2c1f981347f61a0ea0530ac5642fce148059641c237472567b54d4)
---

name: Team Kasich
subject: Tune in Sunday
body:
Be sure to tune in to CBS Face The Nation this Sunday for a
bipartisan discussion with Governor John Kasich and Governor John
Hickenlooper.

Peter, be sure to tune in to
CBS Face The Nation this Sunday for a bipartisan discussion with
Governor John Kasich and Governor John Hickenlooper.

They'll discuss how Republicans
can keep their promise to fix the harmful parts of Obamacare and
reach across the isle to ensure that we're putting in place
meaningful reforms that will last.

You can check your local listing
time (here).

Also, in case you missed Gov.
Kasich's latest op-ed in the Boston Globe, you can read it below:

Boston Globe: Pushing the Reset
Button on Health Care

Like me, many Americans breathed
a deep sigh of relief in late July to hear courageous US senators
say, at last, "enough is enough" on the latest effort to fix
America's health care system. Their votes called a halt to what
seemed like a never-ending replay of "Groundhog Day," marked by a
repeated but unsuccessful push for one-party solutions to health
care reform. It was an encouraging sign that there may no longer
be an appetite in Congress - among rank-and-file members, if not
leadership - for partisan-driven reforms that are contrived
behind closed doors.

After all, we've been down that
road before - an unmapped, dead-end street that may be paved with
good intentions, but ultimately leads us nowhere. It's the same
path, with a different party at the wheel, that got us where we
are today with Obamacare, a one-sided package of reforms pushed
through Congress in 2010. Make no mistake - there are serious
flaws in Obamacare that must be fixed. And I, like most
governors, am convinced that addressing those flaws must continue
to be a top congressional priority. But the unacceptable House
and Senate plans we've seen in recent months would have failed to
address some of the current system's most serious flaws, while
leaving millions of our states' most vulnerable citizens behind.

The Senate's defeat of this most
recent attempt to repair America's health care system gives
Congress a golden opportunity to start over by applying a much
smarter approach - not repeal or replace, but "reset." Throughout
my career in public office, I've learned that meaningful change
happens only with bipartisan support, open debate, and the normal
push and pull of the legislative process.

The best next step is for
Republicans and Democrats to work openly together on an issue we
all agree needs to be fixed: stabilizing our individual health
insurance market, as we watch those markets continue to fail in
both red and blue states.

I'm encouraged to see that
Republican Senator Lamar Alexander and Democratic Senator Patty
Murray have planned bipartisan hearings, and have asked
hospitals, doctors, nurses, and others impacted by the health
insurance industry to help shape new reforms. A willingness to
stabilize the markets will help build a bipartisan foundation
that will be essential to developing a long-lasting and
sustainable health care plan.

By rediscovering how to work
together on these issues, we can begin to create a model that
will lend itself to tackling a wider set of problems with
solutions that are essential to our nation's progress, complex
issues like tax reform, entitlements, and ways to bridge the
growing divide between the rich and poor.

My call for pushing "reset" by
working together on our nation's challenges is not some new idea
or pipe dream. I know it can be done, because I've seen it done.
In the 1990s, I was proud to be part of the team in Congress that
worked across the aisle to overhaul our federal welfare programs,
reform the Pentagon, and balance the federal budget (what a
concept!) for the first time in decades. These bipartisan reforms
began moving America down a better path, but at some point,
Congress lost its way.

To help Congress reset the health
care debate, I've been working with a bipartisan group of
governors - including Massachusetts Governor Charlie Baker - to
create a roadmap that can result in an improved health insurance
system that is available and affordable for every American. We
stand ready to work with our congressional delegations to develop
a plan that is fiscally sound and provides affordable coverage
for our most vulnerable citizens.

Push "reset" and let's get
started!

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/isSLRbEEIN

http://email.sermodigital.com/p/osSLRbEEIN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Democrats.org
subject: Tell Trump not to turn back the clock (add your name)
body:
This ban must be stopped
---
**All those who would defend our right to live freely should be able to serve freely. Add your name: tell Donald Trump to reverse his proposed ban on transgender Americans serving in the military.
**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230cb/4067b0a/33e8b61f8/7e6c972d/175762575/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Reverse-the-Ban1?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170805_joc_nd&source=em_20170805_joc_nd")**
**
Derek --

One of the first campaigns I ever worked on was in Colorado against a woman who thought nothing was more important than preventing gay people from getting married.

She won that race, and she used her position of power to stand in the way of marriage equality. But thanks to countless organizers and activists who have worked over many years to advance LGBTQ rights, I returned to Colorado last fall to marry my wife.

Elections always have consequences. Progress, if taken for granted, can be undone.

We're seeing the tragic consequences of last year's election every day. Over the past seven months, the Trump administration has withdrawn federal protections for transgender students and argued in court that a landmark civil rights law doesn't protect gay and lesbian people from discrimination in the workplace.

And with a tweet last week, Donald Trump launched a new assault on the LGBTQ community -- a sudden announcement that he would ban transgender Americans from serving in the military.

**We've come too far to let this administration trample on the rights of thousands of transgender patriots who have chosen to serve our country. So I'm calling on you to join me in this fight -- add your name and tell Donald Trump to stop this offensive ban:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230cb/4067b0a/33e8b61f8/7e6c972a/175762575/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Reverse-the-Ban1?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170805_joc_nd&source=em_20170805_joc_nd")**
Grassroots organizing helped stop the latest Republican effort to take our health care away. Now, we need to summon that same energy to push back against Trump's latest discriminatory actions.

Thanks so much for being part of this.

Jess

Jess O'Connell
Chief Executive Officer
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230cb/4067b0a/33e8b61f8/7e6c972b/175762575/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170805_joc_nd&source=em_20170805_joc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230cb/4067b0a/33e8b61f8/7e6c9728/175762575/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170805_joc_nd&source=em_20170805_joc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230cb/4067b0a/33e8b61f8/7e6c9729/175762575/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170805_joc_nd&source=em_20170805_joc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230cb/4067b0a/33e8b61f8/7e6c9736/175762575/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170805_joc_nd&source=em_20170805_joc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Update: new maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We're one step closer to breaking the majority, friend. This week, a federal court ruled that Republican legislators must quit dragging their feet and redraw their unconstitutional maps by September 1st.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d9c/2fde7c66/4553901f/15696370/1778192704/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/170804-cooper-newmaps?utm_campaign=em17_170804_newmaps_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170804_newmaps_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
We're one step closer to breaking the majority, friend.

This week, a federal court ruled that Republican legislators must quit dragging their feet and redraw their unconstitutional maps by September 1st.

This is a big first step for us -- the people of North Carolina deserve a system where they choose their representatives, not the other way around.

**With fairer maps, we have a real chance to make big gains in the legislature. But it will take all of us working together to get it done. Can you chip in today?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d9c/2fde7c66/4553901f/15696373/1778192704/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/170804-cooper-newmaps?utm_campaign=em17_170804_newmaps_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170804_newmaps_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&utm_content=2+-++ask++raquo")
---
| | [**$50 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d9c/2fde7c66/4553901f/15696372/1778192704/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJNaUI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/170804-cooper-newmaps?utm_campaign=em17_170804_newmaps_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170804_newmaps_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_content=3+-++ask2++raquo")
---
| [**$100 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d9c/2fde7c66/4553901f/15696375/1778192704/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJNeUI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/170804-cooper-newmaps?utm_campaign=em17_170804_newmaps_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170804_newmaps_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_content=4+-++ask3++raquo")
---
| | [**Other »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d9c/2fde7c66/4553901f/15696374/1778192704/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/170804-cooper-newmaps?utm_campaign=em17_170804_newmaps_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170804_newmaps_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=5+-+Other+raquo")
---

With this ruling, the countdown to the 2018 elections has officially started.

When the new maps come out, we must be in a position to elect legislators in 2018 who are ready to come to the table and work together to get things done.

We need to be ready to hit the ground running when we see the new districts on September 1.

**[Chip in today.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d9c/2fde7c66/4553901f/15696377/1778192704/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/170804-cooper-newmaps?utm_campaign=em17_170804_newmaps_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170804_newmaps_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=6+-+Chip+in+today")**

Thanks for all your support!

Roy
| [**Chip in ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d9c/2fde7c66/4553901f/15696376/1778192704/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/170804-cooper-newmaps?utm_campaign=em17_170804_newmaps_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170804_newmaps_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=7+-+Chip+in+rarr")

clean_body: We're one step closer to breaking the majority, friend. This week, a federal court ruled that Republican legislators must quit dragging their feet and redraw their unconstitutional maps by September 1st. | "" We're one step closer to breaking the majority, friend. This week, a federal court ruled that Republican legislators must quit dragging their feet and redraw their unconstitutional maps by September 1st. This is a big first step for us -- the people of North Carolina deserve a system where they choose their representatives, not the other way around. With fairer maps, we have a real chance to make big gains in the legislature. But it will take all of us working together to get it done. Can you chip in today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" With this ruling, the countdown to the 2018 elections has officially started. When the new maps come out, we must be in a position to elect legislators in 2018 who are ready to come to the table and work together to get things done. We need to be ready to hit the ground running when we see the new districts on September 1. "" Thanks for all your support! Roy | "" * Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Roy Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

body:
Friend --

Your House Republicans took the first step in securing the border -- **they voted to fully fund President Trump 's request to build the wall.**

Not only are we building the wall, but we're also supporting our brave military with the largest pay increase in 8 years.

**Will you show your support for protecting the border by helping to protect our majority?**
**
[Protect our majority now >>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzAwNjE1MDIS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMDUwOTQ4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
